pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly check for PGV amplitude generation.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly verify the CSV report at this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires computing 'PGV' amplitudes for the real 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake using GEOFON miniSEED and USGS QuakeML data. The final report is explicitly expected at '/home/ga/Documents/pgv_report.csv'. Both values are correctly verified via the explicit instructions and verifier scripts.
